name: Hollyland Tally Converter Box
description: This TALLY signal universal converter is used for inter connecting wireless HD video transmission system or wireless intercom system with main stream switchers.

features.Key Features :: USB Supply Power Range 4.5~5.5V DC | Power Consumption <0.5W | Net Weight 88g | Dimension(LxWxH) 68*50*21 mm(USB line length excluded) | Working Temperature -20 +60 | TALLY Signal Control Number Support 8ch TALLY Input
features.What's in The Box :: 1x TALLY Signal Universal Converter | 1x Quick Guide | 1x Adhesive Velcro
